## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration / tooling
- [ ] 🚀 Performance improvement

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests added / updated
- [ ] Manually tested locally

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style (`ruff check .` passes)
- [ ] Type annotations correct (`mypy app` passes)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` or commit messages are descriptive
- [ ] Migrations included if schema changed (`alembic revision --autogenerate`)
